title: Worked Example - Printing Student Roll Numbers

content.problemStatement:
In this example, we demonstrate how to use a for loop in C to print student roll numbers within a specified range. The program starts at the user-defined starting roll number and continues until the user-defined ending roll number, increasing by 1 in each iteration.

---

sampleTestCases.output:
Roll Number: 225
Roll Number: 226
Roll Number: 227
Roll Number: 228
Roll Number: 229
Roll Number: 230
